title: Crepidomanes × amabile
taxonomy: Crepidomanes × amabile is a hybrid species within the genus Crepidomanes of the fern family, Hymenophyllaceae. This genus is a group of small to medium-sized epiphytic ferns, commonly known as air plants or resurrection ferns. The classification of Crepidomanes × amabile is as a hybrid of two species within the genus, but the exact parent species are not specified.
